title: BEM-845 execute after 844
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 20:58 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem844_verify_after_bem842_dispatch.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
status_in=prev.get('status')
if not missing:
    status='ready_to_process_protocol'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif status_in=='dispatch_queue_not_processed':
    status='repair_dispatch_queue_processing'
    next_action='inspect queue processor marker and result writer after BEM-843/BEM-844'
elif status_in=='dispatch_exists_runtime_missing':
    status='repair_runtime_state'
    next_action='parse dispatch result and patch Claude dispatcher runtime proof'
elif status_in=='runtime_exists_response_missing':
    status='repair_response_writer'
    next_action='patch Claude response writer/action prompt'
else:
    status='repair_unknown_missing_proof'
    next_action='diagnose missing: '+', '.join(missing)
state={'bem':'BEM-845','status':status,'bem844_status':status_in,'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem845_execute_after_bem844.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem845_execute_after_bem844.md').write_text('# BEM-845 | Execute After BEM-844 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-845'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem845_execute_after_bem844.json','governance/reports/bem845_execute_after_bem844.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem845_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed next repair decision after BEM-844 proof triad verification')
